_comment: Recorded GCP Carbon Footprint (BigQuery export) emissions (M14.16). The export reports in kilograms CO2e (kgCO2e) per project / service / region, and can attribute to a resource where the label is present — so one resource-grain row (a Compute Engine instance) attributes to inventory and the Cloud Storage row is kept at SERVICE grain, never fabricated to per-resource. Rows are keyed by days_ago so they stay inside the query window. Placeholder project example-project-123456 is retargeted on ingest. Estimates only.
